subcodes.title: Address to crew of the Cedric, spoken on 1912-03-27
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that in this gathering diverse peoples are assembled. Here, we are from the East and you are from the West, yet this very fellowship and unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که در این محفل اجناس مختلفه جمعند در اینجا ما اهل شرقیم و شما اهل غرب همین الفت و اجتماع
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @war and peace, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @The Holy Spirit, @harmony of science and religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @equality of men and women, @oneness; unity of religion
